channel.title: Common Ground - Clearly Blog
channel.description: Real topics, practical advice, and perspectives for co-parents. Custody schedules, communication strategies, and tips for calmer co-parenting.

item.title: How to Handle Your Child's Extracurricular Activity Costs in Co-Parenting
item.description: Learn practical strategies for splitting sports, music, and activity costs with your co-parent fairly. Includes templates and budgeting tips.

item.title: How to Handle Custody Schedules When Your Child Has Special Needs
item.description: Create custody schedules that support your special needs child's routine, therapy, and wellbeing while maintaining fair parenting time for both homes.

item.title: How to Handle Your Child's Teacher Conferences and School Events in Two Homes
item.description: Learn practical strategies for managing parent-teacher conferences, school performances, and academic events when co-parenting across two households.

item.title: When Your Child Asks Which Parent They Love More: How to Respond
item.description: Learn how to handle the difficult question when your child asks which parent they love more. Expert guidance for protecting your child's emotional...

item.title: How to Create Consistent Rules Across Two Homes Without Fighting
item.description: Learn practical strategies for establishing consistent household rules and expectations between co-parenting homes without conflict or control battles.

item.title: What Happens When You Violate a Custody Order: Legal Consequences Explained
item.description: Learn the serious legal consequences of violating a custody order, from fines to jail time, and how to protect yourself from violations.

item.title: How to Handle Gift-Giving and Special Occasions in Blended Families
item.description: Navigate birthdays, holidays, and special events when multiple households, step-parents, and extended families are involved in gift-giving decisions.

item.title: The 50/50 Custody Myth: Why Equal Time Isn't Always Equal
item.description: Discover why 50/50 custody schedules don't guarantee equal parenting time and learn how to create truly balanced arrangements that work for your family.

item.title: How to Introduce Co-Parenting Rules to Your Children: Age-by-Age Guide
item.description: Learn how to explain co-parenting boundaries and house rules to children at different ages. Expert tips for making transitions smoother for kids.

item.title: When Kids Refuse to Go to the Other Parent's House: 5 Essential Steps
item.description: Expert strategies for handling custody resistance without damaging relationships or putting your child in the middle of co-parenting conflict.

item.title: Understanding Child Support Modifications: When and How to Request Changes
item.description: Learn when you can legally modify child support, what triggers qualify, and the step-by-step process to request changes through the court system.

item.title: Starting Over: Essential First Steps When Beginning Your Co-Parenting Journey
item.description: New to co-parenting? Learn the critical first steps every divorced parent needs to take to build a foundation for successful shared parenting.

item.title: When Your Ex Starts Dating: Helping Kids Navigate New Relationships
item.description: Learn how to support your children when your co-parent introduces a new partner. Practical strategies for managing emotions and transitions.

item.title: Creating Age-Appropriate Custody Schedules: What Works at Every Stage
item.description: Learn how to adjust custody schedules as children grow, from toddlers to teens. Expert tips for creating developmentally appropriate parenting time.

item.title: Holiday Custody Schedules: Creating Fair Traditions for Both Homes
item.description: Learn how to create balanced holiday custody arrangements that honor traditions while building new memories in both co-parenting households.

item.title: Requesting Schedule Swaps for Work Travel: A Strategic Approach
item.description: Learn how to successfully request custody schedule changes for work travel, even with a difficult co-parent. Proven strategies for professional...

item.title: How to Handle Schedule Changes Without Conflict or Confusion
item.description: Learn practical strategies for managing inevitable schedule changes in co-parenting while maintaining stability and reducing stress for everyone involved.

item.title: Fear of Abandonment: What Your Child Won't Say But Is Feeling
item.description: Children of divorced parents often develop abandonment fears when exposed to parental conflict. Learn the signs.

item.title: Creating Your First Co-Parenting Plan: Essential Elements Every Parent Needs
item.description: Learn the must-have components of an effective co-parenting plan, from custody schedules to decision-making frameworks that protect your family.

item.title: The #1 Predictor of Children's Wellbeing After Divorce
item.description: It's not the divorce itself that determines how children fare—research points to one factor that matters most.

item.title: When to Divorce: Timing Your Separation Around Life Events
item.description: Strategic considerations for timing divorce around travel, work, birthdays, and major life events to minimize disruption for children and families.

item.title: Is It Time? Making the Hard Decision About Your Marriage
item.description: Struggling with whether to stay or leave? Learn to recognize the signs, explore your options, and make decisions that protect both you and your children.

item.title: The Hidden Truths About Co-Parenting No One Prepared You For
item.description: The realities of co-parenting that most divorced parents only discover through experience. What nobody warns you about — and how to cope.

item.title: Beyond Text: Choosing the Right Communication Channel
item.description: Email, text, apps, phone calls—each has its place. Learn when to use which channel for different conversations.

item.title: The Surprising Benefits of Co-Parenting: Why It's Better Than You Think
item.description: Co-parenting has unexpected advantages nobody talks about — from personal growth to stronger parent-child bonds. Discover the silver linings.

item.title: The Fatal Flaw with Most Co-Parenting Apps (And What Actually Works)
item.description: Co-parenting apps promise to reduce conflict, but often just move the same toxic patterns to a new platform. Here's what needs to change instead.

item.title: When 'Co-Parenting' Becomes 'Counter-Parenting': Recognizing the Difference
item.description: Sometimes what looks like co-parenting is actually working against your child's best interests. Learn to recognize the warning signs.

item.title: The Unexpected Silver Linings: 7 Hidden Benefits of Co-Parenting
item.description: Discover the surprising advantages of co-parenting that no one talks about—from personal growth to stronger family bonds and newfound freedom.

item.title: Timing Your Divorce: When to Consider Separation Around Life Events
item.description: Navigate the complex decision of divorce timing around birthdays, holidays, work changes, and family milestones. Strategic guidance for protecting...

item.title: Helping Your Child Bond with a Stepparent (Without Forcing It)
item.description: Support a natural bond between your child and stepparent without pressure. Respect their pace while creating space for connection.

item.title: How to Set Boundaries in Co-Parent Communication
item.description: Healthy communication boundaries protect your wellbeing and your kids. Set clear limits on topics, timing, and tone with your co-parent.

item.title: How to Protect Your Children from Co-Parenting Conflict
item.description: Shield your children from the effects of co-parenting conflict. Practical strategies to reduce exposure and support their emotional health.

item.title: What to Expect in Family Court: A Co-Parent's Guide
item.description: Heading to family court for the first time? Understand the process, what judges look for, and how to prepare for custody proceedings.

item.title: How to Cope on the Days You Don't Have Your Kids
item.description: The empty days without your children are among the hardest parts of co-parenting. Practical ways to cope and rebuild your routine.

item.title: When Your Child Has a New Sibling at the Other House
item.description: Your co-parent has a new baby? Help your child navigate complex emotions about their new sibling while maintaining their sense of security.

item.title: How to Respond to a Hostile Co-Parenting Message
item.description: Pause before you respond. Extract the real question, remove the emotion, and reply with clarity. A step-by-step approach that works.

item.title: Rebuilding Your Identity After Divorce
item.description: Divorce changes who you are. Navigate the identity crisis, rediscover yourself beyond the marriage, and build a life on your own terms.

item.title: The Gray Rock Method: When Minimal Response Is Best
item.description: Sometimes the most powerful response is the most boring one. Learn how Gray Rock defuses high-conflict situations.

item.title: How to Co-Parent When Your Ex Remarries
item.description: Your ex getting remarried changes the co-parenting dynamic. Navigate new boundaries, roles, and emotions while keeping focus on your kids.

item.title: What to Do When Your Co-Parent Badmouths You to the Kids
item.description: Your children are repeating negative things from the other house? How to respond calmly, protect your bond, and address the behavior.

item.title: What Makes Co-Parenting Communication Actually Work
item.description: Discover the principles behind effective co-parenting communication — from structured messaging to removing emotion from logistics.

item.title: How to Stop Co-Parenting Conflict from Taking Over Your Life
item.description: Co-parenting stress is bleeding into every area of your life? Practical strategies to contain the conflict and reclaim your wellbeing.

item.title: How to Co-Parent with a Narcissist
item.description: Narcissistic co-parenting requires a different playbook. Grey rock, parallel parenting, and written-only communication strategies that work.

item.title: When Co-Parenting Conflict Won't Stop: Knowing When to Get Help
item.description: Self-help strategies aren't enough? Recognize when co-parenting conflict needs professional intervention — and what kind of help to seek.

item.title: What Is Structured Co-Parenting Communication?
item.description: Structured communication keeps co-parenting exchanges topic-based, child-focused, and conflict-free. Understand the framework and how to start.

item.title: When Your Co-Parent Uses the Kids as Messengers
item.description: Stop the cycle of children carrying messages between parents. Understand the damage, set boundaries, and redirect communication properly.

item.title: How to Handle a Co-Parent Who Threatens to Take You to Court
item.description: Constant court threats from your co-parent? Know what to take seriously, what's intimidation, and how to respond without escalating.

item.title: Is It Time? Navigating the Question of Whether to Stay or Go
item.description: Sitting with the hardest question in marriage. How to navigate the space between staying and leaving when you have kids to consider.

item.title: What to Do When Your Co-Parent Brings Up the Past in Every Conversation
item.description: Your co-parent keeps relitigating old issues? Strategies to redirect conversations toward what matters now — your children.

item.title: How to Co-Parent When You're Afraid of Your Ex
item.description: Co-parenting with an intimidating or abusive ex requires different strategies. Protect yourself while meeting your parenting obligations.

item.title: How to Co-Parent with Someone Who Won't Cooperate
item.description: When only one parent is trying, standard co-parenting advice fails. Honest strategies for moving forward when cooperation isn't an option.

item.title: How to Handle Transitions and Drop-Offs with a High-Conflict Co-Parent
item.description: Make custody handoffs less stressful with high-conflict strategies — neutral locations, brief exchanges, and clear boundaries that protect kids.

item.title: Parallel Parenting vs Co-Parenting: What's the Difference?
item.description: Cooperative co-parenting isn't always possible. Understand when parallel parenting is the better strategy and how to make the transition.

item.title: Setting 'Office Hours' for Co-Parent Communication
item.description: You don't have to be available 24/7. Learn how communication boundaries reduce stress and improve your co-parenting.

item.title: Signs Your Co-Parenting Situation Is Improving (Even When It Doesn't Feel Like It)
item.description: Progress in co-parenting is often invisible. Recognize the subtle signs that your situation is improving, even when it feels stuck.

item.title: Co-Parenting Expenses When One Parent Earns More
item.description: Income disparity complicates co-parenting expenses. Understand the difference between equal and equitable — and find an approach that works.

item.title: The Hidden Realities of Co-Parenting No One Warns You About
item.description: Discover the unexpected challenges of co-parenting that catch most divorced parents off guard, from communication struggles to identity shifts.

item.title: How to Build a Communication Record That Protects You
item.description: Build a clean, court-admissible communication record for your co-parenting case. What to document, how to organize, and what to avoid.

item.title: When Your Child Says They Don't Want to Go to the Other Parent's House
item.description: When your child resists going to the other house, the reasons matter. Understand what's behind it and how to respond without escalating.

item.title: How to Handle Last-Minute Custody Schedule Changes
item.description: Your co-parent changed plans without notice? Know your rights, how to respond without escalating, and when to document the disruption.

item.title: How to Protect Yourself from Gaslighting in Co-Parenting
item.description: Recognize gaslighting in co-parenting — denied agreements, rewritten history, and manipulation. Protect your clarity and document everything.

item.title: How to Keep Co-Parenting Conversations Focused on the Kids
item.description: Stop co-parenting conversations from spiraling into personal attacks. Proven techniques to keep every exchange focused on your children.

item.title: How to Handle Medical Expenses in Co-Parenting
item.description: Split medical, dental, and therapy costs fairly with your co-parent. Navigate insurance logistics, reimbursement, and unexpected expenses.

item.title: How to Split Expenses with Your Co-Parent Without Fighting
item.description: Common expense friction points — who pays first, what counts as shared. Practical systems to track and split costs without conflict.

item.title: What to Do When Your Co-Parent Refuses to Communicate
item.description: Dealing with a co-parent who stonewalls? Strategies for managing decisions, documenting attempts, and moving forward without cooperation.

item.title: How to Make a Custody Schedule That Actually Works
item.description: Build a custody schedule that works for your family. Avoid common pitfalls like ambiguity and inflexibility that derail co-parenting.

item.title: From Married Co-Parents to Divorced Co-Parents: The Mindset Shift
item.description: The hardest part of co-parenting after divorce isn't logistics—it's changing how you think about your relationship.

item.title: How to Communicate with a High-Conflict Co-Parent
item.description: Standard communication fails with high-conflict co-parents. Structured approaches that reduce escalation and keep conversations productive.

item.title: How to Co-Parent with Someone Who Uses Email as a Weapon
item.description: Your co-parent sends accusatory, manipulative emails? Strategies for defusing the tactic and keeping communication productive.

item.title: How to Deal with a Co-Parent Who Breaks Agreements
item.description: Your co-parent keeps ignoring what was agreed? Know when to document, when to address it directly, and when to involve the court.

item.title: How to Talk to Your Kids About the Divorce at Every Age
item.description: Age-appropriate ways to explain divorce to your children — from toddlers to teens. What to say, what to avoid, and when to revisit.

item.title: The BIFF Method: Brief, Informative, Friendly, and Firm Communication
item.description: Master the gold standard for high-conflict co-parenting communication. BIFF responses keep conversations productive.

item.title: The 48-Hour Rule: Why Waiting Before Responding Changes Everything
item.description: Before you respond to that provocative co-parenting message, wait 48 hours. This simple practice can transform your communication.

item.title: How to Help Your Child Adjust to Two Homes
item.description: Help your child feel secure living between two homes. Practical tips for transitions, consistency, and emotional support during adjustment.

item.title: How to Handle Holidays and Events with a Blended Family
item.description: Navigate holiday logistics, birthdays, and school events across blended families. Reduce conflict and create positive memories for kids.

item.title: Finding a Therapist Who Understands High-Conflict Co-Parenting
item.description: Generic therapy often falls short for high-conflict co-parenting. Find a therapist who understands power dynamics and custody stress.

item.title: How to Co-Parent When Your Ex's New Partner Gets Involved in Your Co-Parenting
item.description: Your ex's new partner is inserting themselves into co-parenting decisions? Set boundaries while keeping the focus on your children.

item.title: What Counts as a Shared Expense in Co-Parenting?
item.description: Extracurriculars, school supplies, medical co-pays — what counts as shared? Clarify the gray areas that cause the most co-parenting arguments.

item.title: What Your Kids Experience When Co-Parents Can't Communicate
item.description: When co-parents struggle to communicate, children feel it most. Research-backed insights into how conflict affects your kids.

item.title: Relocation After Divorce: What You Need to Know Before You Move
item.description: Planning to move after divorce? Understand the legal requirements, notice obligations, and how relocation affects custody arrangements.

item.title: How to Stop Your Co-Parent from Controlling You Through the Kids
item.description: Your co-parent uses children and logistics to maintain control? Recognize the patterns and break free without harming your kids.

item.title: How to Choose a Family Law Attorney for a High-Conflict Custody Case
item.description: Choosing the right attorney for a high-conflict custody case matters. Know what to look for, what to ask, and red flags to avoid.

item.title: Why Tone Gets Lost in Text—And What to Do About It
item.description: That message you thought was neutral? Your co-parent read it completely differently. Here's why and what to do.

item.title: What Is Contempt of Court in Custody Cases?
item.description: Your co-parent violated a court order? Understand what contempt of court means in custody cases and what legal options you have.

item.title: How to Handle False Accusations from Your Co-Parent
item.description: Facing false accusations from your co-parent? Know how to respond, protect yourself legally, and maintain credibility without retaliating.

item.title: The Stepparent's Role in Co-Parenting: Boundaries That Work
item.description: Define the right role for a stepparent in co-parenting. Clear boundaries that support children while respecting both biological parents.

item.title: The Emotional Toll of Co-Parenting with a Difficult Ex
item.description: The chronic stress of high-conflict co-parenting is real — the hypervigilance, the dread. Validate your experience and find ways to cope.

item.title: How Parental Conflict Affects Children's Relationships Later in Life
item.description: Research shows co-parenting conflict shapes how children form relationships as adults. Understand the long-term impact and how to protect them.

item.title: When Your Co-Parent Undermines Your Parenting
item.description: Your co-parent contradicts your rules and decisions? Identify undermining patterns and respond in ways that protect your authority and your kids.

item.title: What Is a Parenting Plan and Do You Need One?
item.description: A parenting plan covers custody schedules, decision-making, and communication rules. Understand when courts require one and what to include.

item.title: How to Stop Co-Parenting Arguments Over Text
item.description: Text arguments escalate fast because tone is invisible. Practical rules for text-based co-parenting communication that prevent conflict.

item.title: Documentation That Protects: What to Record and Why
item.description: Good documentation isn't about building a case—it's about creating clarity and accountability. Learn what to track.

item.title: What Is a Guardian Ad Litem and What Do They Do?
item.description: Understand the role of a Guardian Ad Litem in custody cases — who appoints them, what they investigate, and how they affect outcomes.

item.title: How to Modify a Custody Agreement: When and How
item.description: Need to change your custody agreement? Understand what qualifies as a substantial change and the legal steps to modify your order.

item.title: Managing Anxiety When You Can't Control What Happens at the Other House
item.description: The anxiety of not knowing what happens at your co-parent's house is real. Practical coping strategies for the things you can't control.

item.title: Signs Your Child Is Struggling with the Divorce (and What to Do)
item.description: Spot the behavioral and emotional signs that your child is struggling with the divorce. What each signal means and how to respond.

item.title: Why Co-Parenting Feels Harder Than It Should
item.description: Co-parenting is harder than anyone prepared you for. Understand the structural reasons why — and what actually makes it easier.

item.title: What Counts as High-Conflict Co-Parenting?
item.description: Not sure if your co-parenting is high-conflict? Identify the patterns, understand when to shift strategies, and protect your wellbeing.

item.title: What Your Teenager Needs from You During and After Divorce
item.description: Teenagers process divorce differently. Understand what your teen actually needs from you — more autonomy, less conflict, honest communication.

item.title: The Spectrum of Co-Parenting: Finding Your Sweet Spot
item.description: Most families aren't fully cooperative or completely parallel. Discover how to find the right balance for your unique situation.

item.title: Co-Parenting vs. Parallel Parenting: Which Approach Fits Your Situation?
item.description: Not all post-divorce parenting looks the same. Learn the key differences between cooperative co-parenting and low-contact parallel parenting.
